Projects.title: Kalbe Engineering System Dashboard
desc: Built an interactive web dashboard for PT Kalbio Global Medika to monitor energy consumption, work orders, MTTR (Mean Time To Repair), MTBF (Mean Time Between Failures), and CAPA (Corrective and Preventive Actions).

Implemented real-time data visualization and monitoring capabilities. Presented and implemented solution based on client needs, delivering a professional dashboard for engineering team oversight and performance tracking.
The dashboard provides critical insights for operational efficiency and helps identify areas for improvement in maintenance workflows.

Projects.title: EduIntel - Data Science Bootcamp Project
desc: Developed a web-based system to detect student performance issues using machine learning algorithms, specifically the Random Forest classifier. This system helps educators identify students who are at risk of underperformance early in the academic term.

Integrated interactive dashboards and model testing interface for practical use by educators. The system enables teachers to upload student data and receive predictions on performance issues, allowing for more targeted early intervention.
Helped improve early intervention strategies in student learning, enabling more targeted support and potentially better academic outcomes for at-risk students.

Projects.title: AI Agent Chatbot System - PT Jababeka Tbk
desc: Developed an enterprise-level internal AI Agent chatbot using LangChain, FastAPI, and Ollama to automate employee support. The chatbot integrates machine learning, NLP, OCR, and automated ticket creation capabilities.

Features include knowledge-base retrieval for quick answers, intelligent troubleshooting, and automated helpdesk ticket creation. The system handles employee inquiries efficiently and escalates complex issues to the appropriate support team.
Successfully deployed in production environment at PT Jababeka Tbk, reducing support response time and improving employee satisfaction with technical support services.

Projects.title: Duplicate Data Detection Tool
desc: Developed an internal automation tool using Streamlit and Python to detect duplicate data in CSV and Excel files. This tool significantly reduces manual analysis time for data quality management.

The application provides an intuitive interface for uploading files, configuring detection parameters, and viewing detailed reports of duplicates found. Features include column matching, threshold configuration, and export functionality.
Successfully deployed at PT Jababeka Tbk to streamline data validation processes and improve data integrity across business operations.

Projects.title: Revenue Cycle System
desc: Built a comprehensive simulation of hospital billing and transaction processes based on real-world data. This Accounting Information System project demonstrates understanding of financial workflows in healthcare settings.

The system handles patient billing, insurance processing, payment tracking, and financial reporting. Includes features for managing receivables, processing payments, and generating financial statements.
Provides insights into healthcare revenue management and demonstrates proficiency in accounting system design and implementation.

Projects.title: PT. Larissa Winri Prakarsa - Company Profile Website
desc: Designed and built a clean, responsive company profile website for a construction firm. The website showcases the company's services, portfolio, and professional capabilities.
Features include branding elements, comprehensive service listings, project portfolio gallery, team information, and contact features. The site is fully responsive and optimized for all devices.
Demonstrates proficiency in creating professional corporate web presence with modern design principles and user-friendly navigation.

Projects.title: BERSUARA - Anonymous Chat Application
desc: Developed an anonymous chat application for President University students featuring an auto-generated username system. Students can communicate freely in a safe, anonymous environment without revealing their identities.

Built using Firebase for real-time messaging and database management, with Android Studio for native mobile application development. Features include real-time notifications, user authentication, and message history.
Successfully deployed to support campus community engagement and provides a platform for candid discussions while maintaining user privacy and anonymity.

Projects.title: The Empathy of Shadow - Generative AI Short Film
desc: Created a generative AI-based short film that tells an emotional journey of a young boy facing his past. The project showcases the creative potential of artificial intelligence in filmmaking and storytelling.

Utilized generative AI tools for scene generation, character creation, and visual effects. The narrative explores themes of personal growth, redemption, and emotional resilience through an innovative AI-generated medium.
Demonstrates expertise in AI applications beyond traditional business use cases and highlights creative problem-solving using emerging technologies.

Projects.title: Hospital Management System
desc: Developed a comprehensive hospital management system using web technologies for patient and doctor data management. The system streamlines hospital operations including patient registration, medical records, and doctor scheduling.

Implemented database optimization and efficient SQL queries for fast data retrieval. Features include patient intake forms, appointment scheduling, medical history tracking, and administrative dashboards.
Demonstrates proficiency in building enterprise-level systems that handle critical healthcare data with security and efficiency.

Projects.title: Preloved Marketplace - Consignment Platform
desc: Led a student business team to build a consignment platform for secondhand fashion and lifestyle goods. The marketplace connects sellers of preloved items with buyers seeking sustainable fashion alternatives.
Oversaw marketing strategy, UX design, and team operations. Implemented features for product listings, seller profiles, transaction management, and buyer reviews.
Successfully launched the platform and achieved recognition in business plan competitions, demonstrating both technical and entrepreneurial capabilities.

Projects.title: Barbershop Appointment System
desc: Designed and implemented an online appointment booking system for barbershops with a clean, intuitive UI/UX. The system allows customers to browse available time slots and book appointments seamlessly.
Features include barber/service selection, real-time availability checking, appointment confirmation, and customer notifications. Backend handles scheduling conflicts and booking management.
Earned 3rd place recognition in the SETsail Biz Accel Exhibition in the Service Category, validating the practical value and user-centric design of the system.
